problem.title: Fraction to Recurring Decimal
problem.description: Given two integers representing the numerator and denominator of a fraction, return the fraction in string format.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Long Division
solutions.description: Simulate long division digit by digit, recording each remainder's position in the result string. When a remainder is seen for the second time a cycle has been detected, and parentheses are inserted at the stored position to mark the repeating part. The key insight is that a cycle must start repeating within at most denominator steps, so a HashMap of remainder-to-index fully captures all repeating patterns.
